'''âk-r-sh-n''' ('''kakarshenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuneify|cuneify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuneify|cuneify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-r-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kakarshenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikarshenoko|thikarshenoko]] || [[word:jikarshenoko|jikarshenoko]] || [[word:shikarshenoko|shikarshenoko]] || [[word:kikarshenoko|kikarshenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukarshenoko|thuthukarshenoko]] || [[word:jujukarshenoko|jujukarshenoko]] || [[word:shushukarshenoko|shushukarshenoko]] || [[word:kukukarshenoko|kukukarshenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokarshenoko|thokarshenoko]] || [[word:jokarshenoko|jokarshenoko]] || [[word:shokarshenoko|shokarshenoko]] || [[word:kokarshenoko|kokarshenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokarshenoko|thokarshenoko]] || [[word:jokarshenoko|jokarshenoko]] || [[word:shokarshenoko|shokarshenoko]] || [[word:kokarshenoko|kokarshenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkarshenoko|thĂŠkarshenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkarshenoko|jĂŠkarshenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkarshenoko|shĂŠkarshenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkarshenoko|kĂŠkarshenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakarshenoko|thakarshenoko]] || [[word:jakarshenoko|jakarshenoko]] || [[word:shakarshenoko|shakarshenoko]] || [[word:kakarshenoko|kakarshenoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
